name: Section: cta
visual: Conversion band: short headline + sub + one primary button; optional decorative corners, bloom/glow, or an inverted dark card for contrast.
placement: Repeated — at least once mid-page and again before the contact/footer. Centered band, or text-left + button-right teaser.
states: Button hover per spec; soft/dark variants may bloom or have a moving gradient.
animation: Band fades up on reveal. soft: nearest-CTA bloom/glow; dark/inverted variant: slow moving gradient; warm/editorial: static, snappy button hover only.
realWorld: Universal: 'Bereit? Termin buchen.' band before footer
Gruber Renger: lime CTA repeated 5+ times at section ends
Tureva: scroll-driven bloom on the nearest CTA
benchmarks: Vanta — 'Meet the new standard for trust'

designLanguage.editorial: Inverted navy card, serif headline, blue button.
designLanguage.swiss: Sharp decorated band, signal-red solid button.
designLanguage.soft: Rounded band with lime bloom CTA.
designLanguage.warm: Paper band, ink-blue button, underline-anim link.
